zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothea von Brandenburg於1430年出生在馬克 布藍登波格時，她的父親Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg24歲，母親Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"25歲。她於1449年10月28日與Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden在丹麥奧本哈福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年11月10日在丹麥維斯亞藍德卡倫德波格卡倫德波格享年65歲，埋葬在丹麥洛斯吉爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothea von Brandenburg于1430年出生在馬克 布藍登波格时，她的父亲Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg24岁，母亲Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"25岁。她于1449年10月28日与Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden在丹麦奧本哈福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年11月10日在丹麦維斯亞藍德卡倫德波格卡倫德波格享年65岁，埋葬在丹麦洛斯吉爾德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

historicEvents.description: Copenhagen is declared the capital city.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothea von Brandenburg was born in 1430, in Mark Brandenburg, her father, Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg, was 24 and her mother, Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg", was 25. She married Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden on 28 October 1449, in København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 November 1495, in Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Denmark, at the age of 65, and was buried in Roskilde, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothea von Brandenburg est née en 1430, à Mark Brandenburg, son père, Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg", avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden le 28 octobre 1449, à København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 novembre 1495, à Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Danemark, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Roskilde, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothea von Brandenburg 1430 in Mark Brandenburg geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg 24 und ihre Mutter Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" 25. Sie hat am 28. Oktober 1449 in København, Dänemark Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. November 1495 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Dänemark und wurde in Roskilde, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothea von Brandenburg è nata il nel 1430 nel Mark Brandenburg, sua padre, Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg", aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden il 28 ottobre 1449, nel København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1495, nel Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Danimarca, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Roskilde, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothea von Brandenburgが1430年にマーク ブランデンブルグで生まれた時，父Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburgは24歳，母Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"は25歳であった。1449年10月28日にデンマーククoベンハヴンでChristian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Swedenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年11月10日にデンマークベストスジaeランドカルンドボルグカルンドボルグで65歳で死去し，デンマークロスキルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothea von Brandenburg(이)가 1430년 마크 브랜덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1449년 10월 28일 덴마크 ko벤하브에서 Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 11월 10일 덴마크 베스츠제이ae랜드 캘런드볼그 캘런드볼그에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 로스킬드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothea von Brandenburg nasceu em 1430, em Mark Brandenburg, seu pai, Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg", tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden em 28 de outubro de 1449, em København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1495, em Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Roskilde, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothea von Brandenburg родилась в 1430 г. в местности марк брэнденбург, её отцу по имени Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg", 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden 28 октября 1449 г. в местности кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 ноября 1495 г. в местности калундборг, калундборг, весцджaeлланд, Дания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности роскаилд, Дания.

Se casó con Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden el 28 de octubre de 1449, en København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1495, en Kalundborg, Kalundborg, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Roskilde, Dinamarca.
